---
title: 'pmsimstats-ng Analysis Reports'
author: 'pmsimstats team'
date: '`r format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d")`'
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    number_sections: true
    latex_engine: xelatex
    includes:
      in_header: preamble.tex
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 8, fig.height = 4.5
)
```

# Overview

This directory contains executable R Markdown reports for
the pmsimstats-ng simulation framework. Reports that require
R execution (data generation, model fitting, plotting) live
here rather than in `docs/`, which contains static LaTeX
documents.

## Available reports

- `11-gompertz-clinician-guide.Rmd`: Clinician-oriented
  guide to the BR-ER-TV framework and Gompertz trajectory
  modeling, with worked examples from the Raskind et al.
  (2013) prazosin trial.

## Rendering

From the Docker container (`make r`):

```r
rmarkdown::render('analysis/report/report.Rmd')
rmarkdown::render(
  'analysis/report/11-gompertz-clinician-guide.Rmd'
)
```

Or from the host:

```bash
make docker-render
```
